title: "Can I Share These... Stickers?”
excerpt: Love this little video shot on Kara's iPhone of Lily thinking the grab bag items were actually hers. And since we're FaceTime buddies, she had to say that at the end. Too adorable.
body: Love this little video shot on Kara's iPhone of Lily thinking the grab bag items were actually hers. And since we're FaceTime buddies, she had to say that at the end. Too adorable.
